title: optimize-operands-order
description: "Put cheap logical operands first."
sidebar:
  badge:
    text: warning
    class: severity-indicator severity-warning

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Put cheap logical operands first. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if expensiveCheck() && ready { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready && expensiveCheck() { start() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only optimize-operands-order`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
